name: Michael Bar-Sinai
bio: Michael Bar-Sinai is a software engineer and researcher. Co-Founder and CTO of Provengo Technologies, a startup building development tools based on formal methods. Michael earned a PhD in Software Engineering, studying Behavioral Programming, model-based software, requirement-based QA, and automation. Before launching Provengo, he was a postdoctoral researcher and fellow at Harvard’s Institute for Quantitative Social Sciences, worked as a senior software architect, and led consultancy projects across industry, academia, and NGOs.
